name: Fan Zhendong
nameEn: FAN ZHENDONG · Table Tennis Legend · Super Grand Slam

timeline.subtitle: Rising Star
achievements: 🏆 World Junior Championships: Men's Singles, Mixed Doubles & Team Champion (Triple Crown)
🏆 National Championships: Defeated Wang Liqin, breakthrough performance
📌 Selected for national team, youngest player at the time

timeline.subtitle: Youngest Pro Tour Champion
achievements: 🏆 Poland Open Men's Singles Champion (youngest Pro Tour singles champion in history)
🏆 Germany Open Men's Singles Champion
🏆 12th National Games: Team Champion, Doubles Champion, Singles Runner-up

timeline.subtitle: Youngest World Champion in History
achievements: 🏆 Tokyo World Team Championships Champion (17 years 103 days, youngest male world champion in Chinese team history)
🏆 Nanjing Youth Olympic Games: Men's Singles & Mixed Team Champion (Double Crown)

timeline.subtitle: First Major Singles Title
achievements: 🏆 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (first major singles title)

timeline.subtitle: First World Championships Title
achievements: 🏆 Düsseldorf World Championships Men's Doubles Champion (with Xu Xin)

timeline.subtitle: World No.1
achievements: 🏆 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (successful defense)
🏆 World Team Championships Champion
📌 Reached World No.1 ranking in April

timeline.subtitle: Three-peat & First-Class Merit
achievements: 🏆 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (three-peat in progress)
🏆 Military World Games: Four gold medals, awarded First-Class Merit
🏆 ITTF World Tour Finals Men's Singles Champion

timeline.subtitle: Four-time World Cup Champion
achievements: 🏆 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (fourth title, completing three-peat)
📌 Tied Ma Lin's record of four World Cup titles

timeline.subtitle: First World Singles Title
achievements: 🥇 Tokyo Olympics Men's Team Champion (China's 4th consecutive Olympic men's team gold)
🥈 Tokyo Olympics Men's Singles Runner-up (lost 2:4 to Ma Long in final)
🏆 National Games Men's Singles Gold (first time)
🏆 Houston World Championships Men's Singles Champion (first world singles title)

timeline.subtitle: WTT Title & National Championships Four-peat
achievements: 🏆 WTT Singapore Smash Men's Singles Champion
🏆 National Championships Men's Singles Champion (first ever men's 'four-peat')
🏆 World Team Championships Champion

timeline.subtitle: Defending World Champion
achievements: 🏆 WTT Singapore Smash Men's Singles Champion (defense)
🏆 WTT Xinlong Champions Men's Singles Champion
🏆 Durban World Championships Men's Singles Champion (successful defense)

timeline.subtitle: Paris Triumph · Grand Slam
achievements: 🏆 WTT Chongqing Champions Men's Singles Champion
🥇 Paris Olympics Men's Singles Gold (beat Truls Möregårdh 4:1 in final)
🥇 Paris Olympics Men's Team Gold

timeline.subtitle: National Games Defense · Historic First
achievements: 🏆 National Games Men's Singles Champion (successful defense, beat Lin Shidong 4:1 in final)
📌 Surpassed Ma Long, became first men's singles two-time National Games champion

timeline.subtitle: Bundesliga · European Treble
achievements: 🇩🇪 Joined Saarbrücken, 29-7 record dominating performance
🏆 Champions League Winner (May, Saarbrücken 3:2 Montpellier)
🏆 German Cup Winner
🏆 Bundesliga Champion (Final 3:1 vs Düsseldorf, won 2 matches)

timeline.subtitle: Transfer to Düsseldorf · New Chapter
achievements: 📌 Officially joined Bundesliga powerhouse Düsseldorf in July
📌 New club debut in August, featured on center poster
📌 Opening a new chapter in overseas table tennis

achievements.title: ⭐ Super Grand Slam
achievements.description: After Ma Long, Fan Zhendong became the second male player in history to win singles titles at the Olympics, World Championships, World Cup, Asian Games, Asian Championships, Asia Cup, World Tour Finals, National Games, and National Championships — the Super Grand Slam.
